title: festuca ovina var. alpestris
intro: Festuca ovina var. alpestris, also known as Alpine Sheep's Fescue, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine Sheep's Fescue include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Festuca ovina var. alpestris typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
